name: Entity Correction
short_description: Post-correction strategies that improve accuracy on domain-specific entities after the raw ASR transcript is produced.
detailed_description: Covers work that takes a raw ASR transcript and applies a correction pass to fix brand names, product lines, SKUs, and other Rezolve-specific entities. Techniques include LLM correction passes, custom vocabulary injection, and contextual entity boosting. Tasks here focus on accuracy gains measured on action-critical spans of the gold-92 benchmark and on the incremental latency cost each approach adds to the voice-to-action pipeline.
